changelog: Full agency delegation infrastructure — 18 new shared modules (delegation-router, task-registry, team-discovery, coordinator, etc.), Mac Mini GUI automation, updated bridge/supreme with dynamic model routing, hardened inbox-watcher with phantom detection.

history.changelog: Agency Powerup — ./tamerclaw powerup sets up a full software agency with CTO, CMO, and specialized agents. Includes 17 new shared modules, mobile store publishing pipeline, and Anthropic SDK integration.
Friendly API error messages — billing limits, rate limits, auth errors now show clean user-facing messages instead of raw JSON dumps
All Claude models online + Mac Mini compute tools
